title: Warehouse SKU Stocking: Maximum Diagonal-Restricted Latin Completion
strategies: stock-nothing baseline: echo only the prefilled slots (reproduces the checker baseline B, ~0.1)
row-major smallest-SKU greedy: fast but dead-ends against tight reachability lists and the extra conveyor-loop rule, leaving many slots empty
MRV fill with seeded restarts: stock the most-constrained slot first with the least-used SKU, keep the best of several restarts -- stocks strictly more slots than greedy
invalid: stock SKU 1 everywhere -> aisle/column/loop distinctness violated and givens clobbered -> rejected (0.0)
